MODULE: cosmos.mcp_server.health_tools
FILE: cosmos/mcp_server/health_tools.py (824 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp_server

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Health MCP Tools

MCP tool implementations for health tracking, nutrition, and recommendations.
Provides Claude with comprehensive health management capabilities.

CLASSES:
- HealthToolResult: Result from a health tool operation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HealthTools: Health tool implementations for MCP server.

Provides tools for:
- Health summar
  Methods: async def cosmos_health_summary(self, date_str: Optional[str]=None) -> HealthToolResult
  Methods: async def cosmos_health_trend(self, metric: str, days: int=7) -> HealthToolResult
  Methods: async def cosmos_nutrition_log(self, meal_type: str, foods: List[dict], notes: str='') -> HealthTool
  Methods: async def cosmos_nutrition_search(self, query: str, limit: int=10) -> HealthToolResult
  Methods: async def cosmos_nutrition_daily(self, date_str: Optional[str]=None) -> HealthToolResult
  Methods: async def cosmos_recipe_suggest(self, meal_type: Optional[str]=None, max_calories: Optional[int]=Non
  Methods: async def cosmos_goal_create(self, name: str, metric_type: str, target_value: float, unit: str, dead
  Methods: async def cosmos_goal_update(self, goal_id: str, current_value: Optional[float]=None, status: Option
